sentences.arabic: كَانَ شَجَرُ التُّفَّاحِ فِي حَدِيقَةِ الْجَدِّ مَلِيئًا بِالثِّمَارِ.
sentences.translation: Stabla jabuka u djedinoj bašti su bila puna plodova.
sentences.translationEn: The apple trees in grandfather's garden were full of fruit.

sentences.translation: Djed i unuk su zajedno brali jabuke.
sentences.translationEn: The grandfather and his grandson picked the apples together.

sentences.translation: Dio su dali komšijama a dio za kuću.
sentences.translationEn: They took some for the neighbors and some for home.
The grandfather said: «Good things are shared».
